title: Self Knowledge & Self Realization
author: Nisargadatta Maharaj
description: This book offers a profound glimpse into the teachings and spiritual journey of Sri Nisargadatta Maharaj, a revered master of Advaita Vedanta and a disciple of Sri Siddharameshwar Maharaj from the Navnath Sampradaya.
